query: ALTER TABLE mall_orders ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS paymentMethod ENUM('stripe', 'points', 'cod') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'stripe'; ALTER TABLE mall_orders ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS stripeSessionId VARCHAR(255); ALTER TABLE mall_orders ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS stripePaymentIntentId VARCHAR(255);
